---
title: "Dashboard"
---


<script>
   // TODO: Update the JSON file paths to match your exported Altair/Vega-Lite dashboard specifications
  vegaEmbed('#chart3', './charts/scatter_placeholder.json', {
    renderer: 'svg',
    actions: false,
  })
</script>

<div id="chart3"></div>

TODO: Update the dashboard caption accordingly

TODO: Explain the significance of the dashboard
 
TODO: Explain the instructions of the dashboard
